title: Grounding: Does it work? With Clint Ober

chunks.title: Introduction to Grounding
chunks.summary: The video begins with the host discussing the importance of grounding, particularly in relation to the immune system. He shares his personal experiences and introduces Clint Ober, the guest expert on grounding and its benefits.

chunks.title: Understanding Grounding
chunks.summary: Clint Ober explains the concept of grounding, focusing on the flow of electrons from the Earth to the human body. He discusses the historical significance of grounding and how modern lifestyles have disconnected people from this natural practice.
